div.p: Gui thong bao tu dong cho nhan vien qua Telegram

div.style: background: #f8f9fa; border-radius: 12px; padding: 20px; margin-bottom: 16px; border: 1px solid #e9ecef;
font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; color: #495057; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.5px; margin-bottom: 14px;

field.name: ten
field.placeholder: Vi du: Bot Thong bao Luong

div.style: font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; color: #1565c0; margin-bottom: 12px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.5px;
background: #1976d2; color: white; border-radius: 50%; width: 22px; height: 22px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; flex-shrink: 0;

div.div: Tren Telegram, tim @BotFather va gui lenh /newbot de tao bot moi

div.style: background: #1976d2; color: white; border-radius: 50%; width: 22px; height: 22px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; flex-shrink: 0;

div.div: Copy Bot Token (dang: 123456:ABC-DEF...) va dan vao o tren

div.style: background: #1976d2; color: white; border-radius: 50%; width: 22px; height: 22px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; flex-shrink: 0;

div.div: Tim @userinfobot, gui /start de lay Chat ID cua ban

div.style: background: #1976d2; color: white; border-radius: 50%; width: 22px; height: 22px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; flex-shrink: 0;

div.div: Bat Kich hoat de he thong dung cau hinh nay gui thong bao
